violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of platform for 3 bay sink in the (bar) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
The walls in basement area is in poor repair(observed holes). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
